templates.name: Web Research Digest
templates.description: Search the web for a topic and return a concise, sourced digest.
templates.whatItDoes: Takes a topic, runs a web search through the Sapiom search capability, then condenses the top results into a short digest with source links. A legible "it did a thing" flagship — one metered capability, an obvious output.

steps.name: search
steps.description: Query the web for the topic.

steps.name: summarize
steps.description: Condense the results into a sourced digest.

templates.name: Hello Agent
templates.description: The minimal single-step agent — a smoke test for the build → deploy → run path.
templates.whatItDoes: Validates an input name and returns a greeting. The smallest valid definition — use it to confirm your MCP install and deploy path work end to end before reaching for a capability.

steps.name: greet
steps.description: Validate the input and return a greeting.

templates.name: The Brain
templates.description: A fleet orchestrator meta-workflow — a brain that scans its fleet, chooses a play from a fixed allow-list, and launches the right child workflow.
templates.whatItDoes: The flagship "agents managing agents" template: a meta-workflow that coordinates a fleet of child workflows through a scan → assess → actuate → report loop. Deterministic code senses (folds a Postgres-backed event bus into crisp situations like no_child_ran_today / cooldown_due / stale_no_result) and acts (launches children behind six guardrails with per-day idempotency); a constrained LLM only chooses a "play" from a fixed allow-list, re-validated in code. A brain is not another limb — it reasons about the whole picture and launches the right member, never doing irreversible work itself. Ships with dryRun (trace the loop offline) and observeOnly (report what it would launch without launching).

steps.name: scan
steps.description: Read the event bus, fold the log into cadence facts, compute deterministic situations.

steps.name: assess
steps.description: Hand the situations to a constrained LLM that may only pick a play from a fixed allow-list; re-validate the JSON.

steps.name: actuate
steps.description: Execute the plan behind six guardrails; launch each due member as a child workflow and append a member.launched row.

steps.name: report
steps.description: Post a briefing to a low-noise channel, append a brain.briefing row, advance the cursor, terminate.
